title: Ledger Panel Turn
prompt: Create a production-ready Ledger Panel Turn using TypeScript React, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion. This original transition swaps between a concise balance summary and an itemized ledger inside one stable white Bento panel. Use #F4F5F6 around the panel, #111111 primary text, #4A4A4F support copy, #ECECEE borders, a 22px radius, and one cyan change marker. Do not use gradients, full-page route transitions, remote assets, or excess decoration. The summary must be useful on initial render and include a clearly labelled View ledger control; activate it with click, Enter, or Space to turn the panel into three line items, then offer Return to summary. Use local state and semantic button markup with aria-expanded and a polite live announcement. The visual change should use opacity and x transform over 240ms cubic-bezier(.22,1,.36,1), with a soft spring near stiffness 310 damping 28 for the cyan marker. Maintain stable card dimensions where feasible to avoid layout shift. The component needs a visible keyboard focus indicator, logical tab order, 44px targets, AA contrast, and text labels that do not rely on color. It must remain legible from a 320px compact preview through a wide detail stage. Do not use timers, randomness, browser storage, or network calls. In prefers-reduced-motion, show the chosen panel with a 120ms fade only. Return complete paste-ready client code plus a pure CSS approximation and suggested HTML.

code.css:
/* HTML: <section class="ledger-panel-turn"><button aria-expanded="false">View ledger</button></section> */
.ledger-panel-turn{max-width:22rem;overflow:hidden;border:1px solid #ececee;border-radius:22px;background:#fff;box-shadow:0 7px 22px rgba(17,17,17,.06)}.ledger-panel-turn button{min-height:44px;margin:20px;padding:0 16px;border:0;border-radius:12px;background:#111;color:#fff;font-weight:800}.ledger-panel-turn button:focus-visible{outline:3px solid #111;outline-offset:3px}@media(prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){.ledger-panel-turn *{transition:none!important}}

demoCode:
